introSection: Dancing Oscar is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Shinhwa Theme Park in Andeok-myeon, Jeju, South Korea.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: In each car, the two rows face away from each other.

fullText:
Dancing Oscar is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Shinhwa Theme Park in Andeok-myeon, Jeju, South Korea.



In each car, the two rows face away from each other.
